message:
🌱 Add prometheus: Support for ingesting out of order exemplars mission (#1692)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "prometheus-13577-support-for-ingesting-out-of-order-exemplars",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "prometheus: Support for ingesting out of order exemplars",
+    "description": "Support for ingesting out of order exemplars. Requested by 11+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current prometheus deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your prometheus version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus\nhelm list -n prometheus 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working prometheus installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review prometheus configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant prometheus configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus\nkubectl get configmap -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=prometheus\n```\nOTLP ingestion includes out of order samples. As a result of that exemplars might also come out of order."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support for ingesting out of order exemplars",
+        "description": "Hi team, \n\n`time=2025-06-09T0725.007Z level=WARN source=write_handler.go:288 msg=\"Error on ingesting out-of-order exemplars\" component=web num_dropped=24`\n\nThis error is pop up for passed few days after touch up with some issue with my otel-contrib collector. Do we have any short term solution on\n```yaml\nstorage:\n  tsdb:\n    out_of_order_time_window: 1d\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus\nkubectl get events -n prometheus --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support for ingesting out of order exemplars\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hi team, \n\n`time=2025-06-09T0725.007Z level=WARN source=write_handler.go:288 msg=\"Error on ingesting out-of-order exemplars\" component=web num_dropped=24`\n\nThis error is pop up for passed few days after touch up with some issue with my otel-contrib collector.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "storage:\n  tsdb:\n    out_of_order_time_window: 1d"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "prometheus",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    ],

+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    ],
